creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
(In reply to Martin Waschbüsch from comment #15)
It seems not:

https://github.com/inverse-inc/sogo/commit/04d12f52f81c4929b37f26e4e24edbbaf636a5ea#diff-75a2ef669be3af6511a265913857936c05f71b11a8464b3e279501b1a43c5895

added the the debugging information with the explicit comment:
"Also store GCC command-line switches in the binaries for easier debugging."
